title: Add Google AdSense verification script to global head

requirements.text: Add the Google AdSense verification script to the global <head> section in frontend/index.html before the closing </head> tag. The script to add is: <script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-7830122739302232" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>. Ensure it does not duplicate if already present.

quotes: Add the following Google AdSense verification script inside the global <head> section of my website so it loads on every page.
Place it before the closing </head> tag and ensure it does not duplicate if already present.

acceptanceCriteria: The AdSense script is present in frontend/index.html inside the <head> section
The script appears before the closing </head> tag
No duplicate AdSense scripts exist in the head section
The script has async attribute and correct crossorigin attribute
The client ID ca-pub-7830122739302232 is correctly included in the script URL

constraints: Do not modify any other layout, styling, or functionality
Only modify frontend/index.html to add the script
Preserve all existing meta tags and scripts in the head section
nonGoals: Adding AdSense ad units to pages
